headline: NVIDIA cuts Q3 revenue guidance citing China export controls
body: NVIDIA Corp said on Tuesday that it expects Q3 revenue to be approximately 4 billion below prior guidance due to new US export restrictions on certain advanced data center chips destined for China. The company added that some of the impact may be offset by domestic AI deployments. Operating margin guidance was reduced to mid-50s percent range from prior guidance of high-50s. CEO Jensen Huang said in a call that the situation remains fluid and the company is working with regulators on compliance pathways.
